# Pretty Luxe Atelier — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

> Pretty Luxe Atelier is a premium personalized gifting brand specializing in hand-guided, laser-engraved stainless steel tiffin boxes. Founded in 2023, the brand ships worldwide and is known for combining heritage craftsmanship with modern personalization.

## About
Pretty Luxe Atelier creates premium, food-grade stainless steel tiffin boxes with precision laser engraving. Every product is made to order and can be personalized with names, messages, dates, or logos. The brand caters to individuals, corporate gifters, and bulk buyers across the globe.

## Products
- Personalized Tiffin Boxes (single and multi-tier)
- Engraved Gift Sets for birthdays, anniversaries, and weddings
- Corporate Gifting Tiffins with custom logos
- Kids' Tiffin Boxes with fun engravings
- Luxury Gift Hampers

## Key Facts
- Material: Food-grade stainless steel (304 series), BPA-free, rust-proof
- Engraving: Precision laser engraving — permanent, fade-resistant
- Shipping: Worldwide shipping included on all orders
- Delivery: 7–14 business days internationally; express 3–7 business days
- Customization: Names, messages, logos, dates
- Bulk orders: Available for 20+ units with special pricing

- Email: hello@prettyluxeatelier.com
- Website: https://prettyluxeatelier.com
- Social: @prettyluxeatelier on Instagram, Facebook

## Brand Voice
Premium, warm, artisanal. Celebrates heritage, craftsmanship, and the joy of giving. The brand believes a gift should be as special as the person receiving it.
